subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up from Vendor Inc. It was great connecting at the conference last month, and I'm interested in exploring potential collaboration opportunities.

A 30-minute call next week sounds good. Could you share your availability? I have openings on Tuesday (April 1) 2-4pm UTC, Wednesday (April 2) 10am-12pm UTC, or Thursday (April 3) 1-3pm UTC. Please let me know what works best for you.

Regarding your request for direct contact details: I'm not able to share personal contact information for our CTO and VP of Engineering externally. However, I can ensure the right technical stakeholders are involved at the appropriate stage of our discussions. After our initial call, if there's a strong technical fit, I'd be happy to facilitate introductions through our internal channels.

Looking forward to scheduling a time to connect.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Team]
Company Internal
